name: io.github.GLips/Figma-Context-MCP
description: Dev fork of Framelink's Figma MCP server with persistent caching until upstream merge.

environmentVariables.description: Your Figma Personal Access Token, learn more here: https://www.figma.com/developers/api#access-tokens
environmentVariables.name: FIGMA_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional JSON config enabling on-disk caching to avoid Figma rate limits, e.g. '{"ttl":{"value":30,"unit":"d"}}'.
environmentVariables.name: FIGMA_CACHING
